heading: Omitted
label: 231 to 250 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 231 to 250, relating to Columbia Institution for the Deaf, were transferred to sections 31–1001 to 31–1020 of the District of Columbia Code and subsequently repealed by acts , ; , ; , , . The Columbia Institution for the Deaf was redesignated Gallaudet College by act , and thereafter redesignated Gallaudet University by , , , which is classified to subchapter I (§ 4301 et seq.) of chapter 55 of Title 20, Education.Aug. 6, 1946, ch. 770, § 1(61)60 Stat. 871June 18, 1954, ch. 324, § 968 Stat. 267Pub.
